description:
Rio terminal is a hardware-accelerated GPU terminal emulator, focusing to run in desktops and browsers.

Rio terminal is a hardware-accelerated GPU terminal emulator, focusing to run in desktops and browsers.
The supported platforms currently consist of BSD, Linux, MacOS and Windows.
- Fix: panic and crash of terminal window during sudo apt update #1093.
Changelog
- 26fe503 update to 0.2.14
- b6a437f fix index out of reach for line (closes #1093)
- df47595 cut 0.2.13 version in docs
- 0de8c61 update docs
